title: Echo harpoon
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |name = Echo harpoon |image = [[File:Echo harpoon.png]] |release = [[27 November]] [[2024]] |update = Leagues V: Raging Echoes OUT NOW! |members = No |quest = No |tradeable = No |placeholder = |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = No |options = Wield, Toggle, Destroy |destroy = You can get this item back by talking to the Sage near Lumbridge. |examine = A very powerful harpoon, echoing with power from the past. |value = 0 |weight = 0.907 |id = 25114 }} [[File:Echo harpoon detail.png|left|130px]] The '''Echo harpoon''' is an item that can be obtained during the [[Grid Master]] [[community event]] by unlocking the [[Animal Wrangler]] relic. The echo harpoon has no requirement to use or equip, and functions as a non-degradeable version of the [[crystal harpoon]]. In addition, it has the following other benefits: * On failing to fish a spot, there will be a separate 50% chance to succeed. * Any items gathered from [[Fishing]] (apart from [[Raw karambwanji|Raw Karambwanji]], which are stackable) are automatically sent to the player's [[bank]]. * Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster. * Acts as a [[Small_fishing_net|net]], [[Big fishing net|big net]], [[lobster pot]], or any rod whilst fishing (appropriate bait is still required). The echo harpoon also has a toggle-able effect: * Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting [[Cooking]] experience regardless of level requirements. {{Echo skill success chart|skill=Fishing}} ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = weapon |speed = 5 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Stab Sword |image = [[File:Echo harpoon equipped male.png|250px]] |altimage = [[File:Echo harpoon equipped female.png|250px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Stab Sword|speed=5|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Echo fishstabber.webm|frame|A player performs the echo harpoon's special attack, ''Fishstabber''.]] The echo harpoon has the same [[special attacks|special attack]] as the [[dragon harpoon]] and [[crystal harpoon]], ''Fishstabber'', that provides a visible +3 [[boost]] to [[Fishing]], consuming 100% special attack energy. Also note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98, with there being no value in activating the special attack at level 99. ==Transcript== {{Hastranscript|item}} ==Past appearances== This item appeared in a previous [[temporary event]], with the following differences from its latest incarnation: *[[Raging Echoes League]] **The echo harpoon was obtained by selecting the [[Animal Wrangler (Raging Echoes League)|Animal Wrangler]] tier 1 relic. **[[Free-to-play]] players could not participate in the League. *The [[trailblazer harpoon]] was a very similar item used in previous events. ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 15 October 2025 |update = Grid Master - Out Today! |change = The echo harpoon was re-added at the start of [[Grid Master]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 22 January 2025 |update = Bank QoL & Mini Menu Improvements |change = The echo harpoon was removed at the conclusion of [[Raging Echoes League]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 27 November 2024 |update = Leagues V: Raging Echoes OUT NOW! |change = The echo harpoon was added with the start of [[Raging Echoes League]]. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Echo harpoon (Raging Echoes League) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Echo harpoon detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Echo harpoon (Raging Echoes League).png|center]] |[[File:Echo harpoon.png|center]] |- |[[File:Echo harpoon (Raging Echoes League) equipped male.png|center|300x300px]] |[[File:Echo harpoon equipped male.png|center|300x300px]] |- |27 November 2024 -
22 January 2025 |15 October 2025 -
12 November 2025 |} ==Trivia== *Using the echo harpoon's special attack causes the model to turn into that of the [[Trailblazer harpoon (Trailblazer League 2020)|trailblazer harpoon]] from the original [[Trailblazer League (2020)|Trailblazer League]]. * Although the echo harpoon acts as a rod for catching fish, it does not work for retrieving your pet rock from the geyser during [[The Fremennik Exiles]]. {{Grid Master}} {{Raging Echoes League}} {{Fishing equipment}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]]
